  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtAuthFilter.java

- Test directory: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/

- Log output: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/m1-m2-m3-m6/logs/test-agent-2.log.md

Task description:
Build M1 Auth API layer: AuthService, AuthController, and auth DTOs (RegisterRequest, LoginRequest, LoginResponse, UserResponse).

ALLOWED implementation files (Worker will create these — you write tests for them):
1. service/AuthService.java — register (bcrypt), login (verify + generate token), getCurrentUser
2. controller/AuthController.java — POST /api/auth/register, POST /api/auth/login, GET /api/auth/me
3. dto/RegisterRequest.java — username (3-50, ^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$), password (min 8), displayName (1-100)
4. dto/LoginRequest.java — username, password
5. dto/LoginResponse.java — token (String), expiresIn (long)
6. dto/UserResponse.java — id (long), username, displayName

Acceptance criteria to test (from M1 spec, 14 ACs):
- AC1: POST /api/auth/register with valid data → 201 + {id, username, displayName}
- AC2: POST /api/auth/register with existing username → 409 Conflict
- AC3: Password stored as bcrypt hash (not plaintext)
- AC4: POST /api/auth/login with correct credentials → 200 + {token, expiresIn}
- AC5: POST /api/auth/login with wrong password → 401
- AC6: POST /api/auth/login with non-existent username → 401
- AC7: GET /api/auth/me with valid token → 200 + {id, username, displayName}
- AC8: GET /api/auth/me without Authorization header → 401
- AC9: GET /api/auth/me with expired token → 401
- AC10: GET /api/auth/me with malformed token → 401
- AC11: Register with username <3 or >50 chars → 400
- AC12: Register with password <8 chars → 400
- AC13: Register with empty or >100 char displayName → 400
- AC14: Register with non-alphanumeric username (spaces, special chars) → 400

TEST DESIGN:
- Use @SpringBootTest + @AutoConfigureMockMvc + MockMvc for integration tests
- These are FULL integration tests — the entire auth flow should work end-to-end
- Register a user, then login, then use token for /me
- Test validation using invalid request bodies
- For AC3: After register, query DB directly to verify bcrypt hash
- For AC8-10: Use SecurityConfigIntegrationTest patterns (already exists)
- Use @Transactional or @DirtiesContext to isolate tests as needed

IMPORTANT:
- Read the READONLY implementation files FIRST to understand exact method signatures, field names, etc.
- Tests should import from actual packages (com.taskflow.service.AuthService, com.taskflow.controller.AuthController, etc.)
- Use JUnit 5 + Spring Boot Test
- Tests MUST fail when run (implementation doesn't exist yet)
- Do NOT create implementation files

OUTPUT: Write test files, return list of paths created.

LOG WRITING (append-only):
[LOG] task=T2 | event=test-design-start | strategy=red-green,boundary,error,contract
[LOG] task=T2 | event=test-design-complete | test-files={list} | test-count={number}

1→[SECTION] API Contract
     2→[VERSION] 1
     3→
     4→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/register | req={username:string(3-50,alphanumeric+underscore),password:string(min8),displayName:string(1-100)} | res=201:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=400,409
     5→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/login | req={username:string,password:string} | res=200:{token:string,expiresIn:long} | errors=401
     6→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/auth/me | req=none | res=200:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=401
     7→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/tasks | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string(max5000,optional),priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,default:MEDIUM)} | res=201:{id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:string,status:string,createdBy:long,createdAt:datetime,updatedAt:datetime?} | errors=400,401
     8→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none | res=200:{id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:string,status:string,createdBy:long,createdAt:datetime,updatedAt:datetime?} | errors=401,404
     9→[ENDPOINT] method=PUT | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string(max5000,optional),priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,optional)} | res=200:{same-as-get} | errors=400,401,404
    10→[ENDPOINT] method=DELETE | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none | res=204:no-content | errors=401,404
    11→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks | req=query:{page:int(default:0),size:int(default:20),sort:string(default:createdAt,desc),keyword:string?,priority:enum?} | res=200:{content:TaskResponse[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int} | errors=401
    12→[ENDPOINT] method=PATCH | path=/api/tasks/{id}/status | req={status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)} | res=200:{same-as-task-response} | errors=400,401,404
    13→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id}/transitions | req=none | res=200:{currentStatus:string,availableTransitions:string[]} | errors=401,404

    17→[TYPE] name=UserResponse | fields=id:long,username:string,displayName:string
    18→[TYPE] name=PageResponse<T> | fields=content:T[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int
    19→[TYPE] name=Priority | fields=enum:HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW

    23→[TRANSITION] TODO -> IN_PROGRESS
    24→[TRANSITION] IN_PROGRESS -> TODO
    25→[TRANSITION] IN_PROGRESS -> DONE
    26→[TRANSITION] DONE -> CLOSED
    27→[TERMINAL] CLOSED (no outgoing transitions)
    28→
    29→[SECTION] Error Format
    30→[FORMAT] status:int,message:string,errors?:string[]
    31→
    32→[SECTION] Amendment Log
    33→

1→# M1: Authentication (JWT)
     2→
     3→## 需求描述
     4→
     5→本模組提供基於 JWT（JSON Web Token）的使用者身份驗證機制，包含註冊、登入與取得當前使用者資訊三項核心功能。所有需要身份驗證的 API 端點皆透過 JWT Bearer Token 進行授權驗證。
     6→
     7→使用者註冊時須提供唯一的使用者名稱、密碼與顯示名稱。密碼必須使用 bcrypt 雜湊後儲存，禁止以明文形式保存。登入成功後回傳 JWT Token，Token 包含使用者 ID 與過期時間資訊。
     8→
     9→受保護的端點需在 HTTP Header 中攜帶 `Authorization: Bearer <token>`，伺服器驗證 Token 的有效性與過期狀態後才允許存取。
    10→
    11→## 驗收標準
    12→
    13→- AC1: 呼叫 POST /api/auth/register 帶入合法的 username、password、displayName，回傳 HTTP 201 且回應包含新建使用者的 id、username、displayName
    14→- AC2: 呼叫 POST /api/auth/register 帶入已存在的 username，回傳 HTTP 409 Conflict 且回應包含錯誤訊息
    15→- AC3: 儲存於資料庫中的 password 欄位為 bcrypt 雜湊值，非明文密碼
    16→- AC4: 呼叫 POST /api/auth/login 帶入正確的 username 與 password，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應包含 token（非空字串）和 expiresIn 欄位
    17→- AC5: 呼叫 POST /api/auth/login 帶入錯誤的 password，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
    18→- AC6: 呼叫 POST /api/auth/login 帶入不存在的 username，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
    19→- AC7: 攜帶有效 JWT Token 呼叫 GET /api/auth/me，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應包含 id、username、displayName
    20→- AC8: 不攜帶 Authorization Header 呼叫 GET /api/auth/me，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
    21→- AC9: 攜帶過期的 JWT Token 呼叫 GET /api/auth/me，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
    22→- AC10: 攜帶格式錯誤的 JWT Token 呼叫 GET /api/auth/me，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
    23→- AC11: 註冊時 username 少於 3 字元或超過 50 字元，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    24→- AC12: 註冊時 password 少於 8 字元，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    25→- AC13: 註冊時 displayName 為空或超過 100 字元，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    26→- AC14: 註冊時 username 包含非英數字或底線的字元（如空格、特殊符號），回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    27→
    28→## API 端點
    29→
    30→### POST /api/auth/register
    31→- 說明: 註冊新使用者
    32→- Request Body:
    33→  ```json
    34→  {
    35→    "username": "string (3-50 chars, alphanumeric + underscore)",
    36→    "password": "string (min 8 chars)",
    37→    "displayName": "string (1-100 chars)"
    38→  }
    39→  ```
    40→- Success Response: 201 Created
    41→  ```json
    42→  {
    43→    "id": "long",
    44→    "username": "string",
    45→    "displayName": "string"
    46→  }
    47→  ```
    48→- Error Responses: 400 (validation failed), 409 (username already exists)
    49→
    50→### POST /api/auth/login
    51→- 說明: 使用者登入，取得 JWT Token
    52→- Request Body:
    53→  ```json
    54→  {
    55→    "username": "string",
    56→    "password": "string"
    57→  }
    58→  ```
    59→- Success Response: 200 OK
    60→  ```json
    61→  {
    62→    "token": "string (JWT)",
    63→    "expiresIn": "number (seconds, 86400)"
    64→  }
    65→  ```
    66→- Error Responses: 401 (wrong credentials)
    67→
    68→### GET /api/auth/me
    69→- 說明: 取得當前已登入使用者資訊
    70→- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
    71→- Success Response: 200 OK
    72→  ```json
    73→  {
    74→    "id": "long",
    75→    "username": "string",
    76→    "displayName": "string"
    77→  }
    78→  ```
    79→- Error Responses: 401 (missing/invalid/expired token)
    80→
    81→## 業務規則
    82→
    83→- BR1: username 長度限制 3-50 字元，僅允許英文字母、數字與底線（正則: `^[a-zA-Z0-9_]{3,50}$`）
    84→- BR2: password 最少 8 字元，無上限限制
    85→- BR3: displayName 長度限制 1-100 字元，允許任意 Unicode 字元
    86→- BR4: password 使用 bcrypt 演算法雜湊後儲存，不得以明文儲存
    87→- BR5: JWT Token 有效期為 24 小時（86400 秒）
    88→- BR6: username 在系統中必須唯一（不區分大小寫或區分大小寫皆可，但同一字串不可重複）
    89→- BR7: 登入失敗時不應區分「使用者不存在」與「密碼錯誤」，統一回傳 401 以防止帳號列舉攻擊
    90→
    91→## 相依模組
    92→
    93→- 依賴: 無
    94→- 被依賴: M2 (Task CRUD)、M3 (Task State Machine)、M4 (Tag System) — 所有需要身份驗證的模組
    95→

Confirmed: `AuthService.java`, `AuthController.java`, `RegisterRequest.java`, `LoginRequest.java`, `LoginResponse.java`, and `UserResponse.java` do not exist yet. The tests will fail at compilation, which is the expected "red" state for red-green testing.

Here is the summary of what was done:

---

**Test files created (4 files, ~55 test methods total):**

1. **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/controller/AuthControllerIntegrationTest.java`** (35 tests)
   - Full `@SpringBootTest` + `@AutoConfigureMockMvc` integration tests covering all 14 ACs
   - AC1: Register valid data returns 201 with id/username/displayName (9 boundary tests)
   - AC2: Duplicate username returns 409
   - AC3: Password stored as bcrypt hash, verified via direct DB query
   - AC4: Login returns 200 with token/expiresIn (3 tests including JWT validation)
   - AC5: Wrong password returns 401
   - AC6: Non-existent username returns 401 (includes BR7 anti-enumeration check)
   - AC7: Valid token on /me returns 200 (2 tests, ensures no password in response)
   - AC8: Missing auth header returns 401
   - AC9: Expired token returns 401 (manually crafted expired JWT)
   - AC10: Malformed token returns 401 (4 variants: invalid string, random, empty bearer, wrong scheme)
   - AC11: Username length violations return 400 (4 boundary tests)
   - AC12: Password too short returns 400 (3 tests)
   - AC13: DisplayName violations return 400 (2 tests)
   - AC14: Invalid username chars return 400 (5 tests: space, @, hyphen, dot, unicode)
   - End-to-end: Full register -> login -> /me flow

2. **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/service/AuthServiceTest.java`** (10 tests)
   - Unit tests with Mockito mocks for `UserRepository`, `PasswordEncoder`, `JwtTokenProvider`
   - `register()`: bcrypt encoding, UserResponse return, duplicate check, field mapping
   - `login()`: token generation, wrong password, non-existent user
   - `getCurrentUser()`: happy path, user-not-found
   - Contract: method signature verification

3. **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/dto/RegisterRequestValidationTest.java`** (18 tests)
   - Jakarta Validation tests (no Spring context)
   - Username: min/max boundary, null, empty, special chars, hyphen, digits-only, underscores
   - Password: min boundary, below min, empty, null, long password
   - DisplayName: min/max boundary, above max, empty, null, unicode
   - Contract: getter/setter verification

4. **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/dto/AuthDtoContractTest.java`** (14 tests)
   - Contract tests for all 4 DTOs: `LoginRequest`, `LoginResponse`, `UserResponse`, `RegisterRequest`
   - Verifies field types, getter/setter existence, no-args constructor instantiation
